phase_a.name: Shadow-Only Execution
phase_a.description: Phase 4 active but no structural changes; proposals logged, canary telemetry collected

phase_b.name: Canary Promotions (Minor Deltas)
phase_b.description: Allow canary growth for non-structural parameter adjustments only

phase_c.name: Full Structural Regime Evolution
phase_c.description: Allow structural proposals with governance approval
requirements: Phase B metrics healthy (all thresholds OK)
